column1: uriel: let's have a good game
C[uriel: let's have a good game
uriel: thought we had main time haha
Notbiased: we got into byo yomi fast :)
uriel: that should teach me to look at the settings before accepting a game :p
Notbiased: that has happen to me to many time to count :P
uriel: ah well, thanks for the game :)
Notbiased: thanks you it was fun
C[uriel: this is the first live game i've seen on nova haha
C[uriel: i was reading a thread on a go forum
uriel: about how great this server is
uriel: so i decided to make an account
uriel: do you play here often?
C[acorn: I only discovered nova a few days ago
acorn: this is my first live game here :)
uriel: do you play online anywhere else?
dmf: everytime someone plays a live game there's ton of spectators :D
C[uriel: i like the interface so far
C[uriel: if the server population actually grows it could be pretty cool
C[uriel: what does the undo request look like?
C[uriel: you can pause games here
C[acorn: the ability to link to variations is great too
acorn: I don't think you can do that at the moment, as analysis is disabled
uriel: yea it's pretty bad on kgs
acorn: useful if you have a bunch of people reviewing a game
acorn: or for a malkovich log
uriel: yea, that's a nice feature too
C[uriel: i just started a malkovich game on L19x19
acorn: I thought that was a forum
uriel: we play by making diagrams haha
C[acorn: urgh, do I have enough shape to make eyes?
C[acorn: I don't think I've ever played an even game against a stronger player before..
uriel: what do you think so far?
C[acorn: difficult enough with handicap stones :)
C[uriel: you've been playing well so far though
C[uriel: have you heard of the ASR on KGS?
uriel: it's called the Advanced Study Room
C[uriel: it's like a study league, kind of
uriel: you play slower, even games
uriel: and then review them after
acorn: I've only come across the teaching ladder
uriel: there's different divisions and stuff
C[acorn: kgs has such helpful players
uriel: i can't believe i tenukied initially :\\
uriel: didn't realize you could live with m11
C[acorn: I really need to brush up on my life and death..
C[acorn: urgh, monkeyjump, there goes my territory :)
C[acorn: monkeyjump + low timer is a lethal combo :)
C[uriel: yea, i don't know how to add time or i would
C[acorn: get back in your cage monkey!!
C[uriel: haha no, there are mangos out here!
C[acorn: heh, I'm definitely testing the accuracy of the timer now..
acorn: how did I need to respond to that?
acorn: is b1 the vital point?
GN[This is the game that has a name]
fly: my interenet is a bit spotty but
fly: I guess there's no waiting time?
fly: well, good game! That was fun
uriel: i think i'd lose haha
uriel: if you didn't run out of time
fly: haha I dunno black's doing okay :)
fly: but I think n15 gave me good shape
uriel: that was a bad play on my part
fly: still b has a nice big corner
fly: some solid territory up top...
uriel: seems w's caught up already
fly: but now q10 group is getting weaker, I can work to attack it
uriel: i didn't know what to do
fly: I think you handled R16 very well
uriel: that was the only part of my play i liked haha
fly: Anyway, it was a pleasure to play you...probably shouldn't do a rematch until I have a surer connection
fly: or nova gives me a little lag leniency
uriel: yea... that would be good
C[oherrala: This move is so powerful that white couldn't found a response to it.
